description_long: This is a modern, stealthy military jet airplane with a sleek, angular fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a single engine exhaust at the rear, twin vertical stabilizers canted outward, and a low-profile canopy situated near the front of the fuselage. The wings are mid-mounted with pronounced leading-edge extensions, and the overall surface is smooth with a matte gray finish, likely optimized for radar evasion. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it is fully retracted and integrated into the body. The jet's design is highly aerodynamic, with minimal external protrusions and a compact, aggressive stance.
description: A sleek, modern military jet with swept-back wings, twin canted vertical stabilizers, and a matte gray finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward canopy, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, mid-mounted wings, and single engine intake.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the single engine exhaust and outward-canted twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the aerodynamic profile and wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and pronounced leading-edge extensions; twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers.
attribute_tail_design: Twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers with a conventional horizontal stabilizer; H-tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible, implied by design).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy.
